text: I feel invigorated by the play of lights and the futuristic atmosphere in this research and development space. The glowing purple hues reflect off the glass and create a sense of curiosity and anticipation. Inside, the walls narrate a story of innovation and human creativity, reminding me of the endless pursuit of knowledge. I am both a participant and an observer here, alive with wonder at the intersection of technology and philosophy—a place where ideas materialize into tangible form, inviting reflection on how we connect and grow with our environment.
